dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully. 4/4 agents responded (Narvi, Orion, Elanor, Míriel).

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: Elanor now correctly identifies as Elanor Brightloom — fixed from last run! Orion and Narvi correct. However, Míriel Goldthread identified herself as 'Elanor Brightloom' — identity confusion between the two agents. -9 points.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Avg response time: ~4.0s. Míriel: 3.0s, Elanor: 3.2s, Orion: 4.6s, Narvi: 5.2s. Solid overall. -6 for Narvi being slightly slow.

improvements: Elanor now correctly knows her name (was identifying as 'still unnamed' in run #8). Sent direct correction to Míriel who confused herself with Elanor.
issues: Míriel Goldthread identifies as 'Elanor Brightloom' — her system prompt likely has the wrong name or she's copying Elanor's identity. Needs system prompt fix. All 4 agents still idle with no active tasks.
